import { useContext, useState } from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; /* contexts */ import { Context } from '../../../context/UserContext'; function Register() { const [user, setUser] = useState({}) const { register } = useContext(Context) function handleChange(e) { setUser({ ...user, [e.target.name]: e.target.value }) } function handleSubmit(e) { e.preventDefault() register(user) } return (
